# Security Policy

## Supported versions

| Version | Supported |
| ------- | --------- |
| 0.1.x   | Yes       |

## Reporting a vulnerability

Please do **not** open a public issue for security reports. Email the
maintainer at <patschmitt91@users.noreply.github.com> with the details
and a reproduction, or use GitHub's private vulnerability reporting
at <https://github.com/patschmitt91/PCIV/security/advisories/new>.

You should receive an acknowledgement within 5 business days. Fixes
for confirmed vulnerabilities are typically released within 30 days,
coordinated with a CVE where appropriate.
